mapper.select: /* wif-das-classificationtotemapping-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteMappingWaveSeq - 분류토트매핑웨이브 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_mapp_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationtotemapping-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteMappingOrderSeq - 분류토트매핑오더 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_mapp_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
